rule: Samples prove that the general product can create unrelated independent applications. No sample may define Archie navigation, runtime policy, training policy, or core terminology.

samples.title: Deterministic self-hosting reference
samples.purpose: prove Sideways objective derivation, Maker authority, verification, and trajectory plumbing

samples.title: LBTB purchase-order processor
samples.purpose: prove that the same general creation path can build an independent Gmail-connected business application
must_not: be required for native runtime operation
be treated as the Archie product
leak Gmail, school, student, or purchase-order terminology into core product contracts

samples.title: Personal field-notes app
samples.purpose: prove consumer app generation unrelated to business operations

samples.title: Visual data-story app
samples.purpose: prove creative and data application generation

claim_boundary: Catalog entries are required demonstrations, not claims that Archie has already generated, verified, installed, or distilled each application.
